title: Hem Magnolia Incense Sticks – 6 Pack | Lush Floral Scent for Relaxing, Feminine Spaces & Mood Enhancement
features: Calming Precious Lily Scent: Features a divine floral aroma that promotes inner peace and positive energy—ideal for meditation, spiritual rituals, or relaxation.
Extended Burn Time: Each 8-inch stick delivers a burn time of approximately 45–50 minutes, offering hours of soothing atmosphere.
Hand-Rolled & Non-Toxic: Carefully crafted in India using a traditional recipe and chemical-free, eco-safe ingredients
Holistic Wellness Use: Supports skin benefits, energy cleansing, stress relief, pooja worship, and calming aromatherapy routines.
Great for Gifting: A perfect spiritual or festive gift for Diwali, Christmas, New Year, or housewarmings, beautifully packaged for any occasion.
description: Experience the ancient essence of India with Seven Chakra Tree Hem Precious Incense Sticks – a premium blend crafted for daily relaxation, spiritual rituals, and aromatic enrichment. Each stick is hand-rolled using a traditional recipe passed down through generations, infused with natural ingredients that promote healing, calmness, and clarity. Ideal for aromatherapy, meditation, or prayer, this set of 6 boxes (each containing 20 sticks) is a perfect addition to your spiritual routine or home fragrance setup. Whether you light it twice daily as a room freshener or use it to enhance your yoga or mindfulness practice, the rich and soothing aroma fills your space with tranquility and balance. This incense is more than a fragrance – it’s a holistic tool rooted in heritage. Safe, non-toxic, and easy to use, simply light a stick in a well-ventilated, non-flammable area and enjoy 45–50 minutes of continuous aromatic bliss. Beautifully packaged and suitable for gifting, it pairs well with wooden incense holders and makes a thoughtful gift for loved ones on occasions like Diwali, Christmas, New Year, or housewarmings. Product Dimensions: 9.3 cm x 6.0 cm x 25.5 cm Pack Size: 6 Boxes (20 Sticks per Box)
